/*ADDED AS PART OF  WEEKLY BILLINGS FY20*/
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFD
ON RFD.CALENDAR_DATE=Cast(INV_REV.GL_DT AS DATE)
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFM ON
RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=INV_REV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFDM
ON RFDM.CALENDAR_DATE=CASE WHEN Cast(INV_REV.GL_POSTED_DTM AS DATE)<= RFD.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE AND INV_REV.GL_DT BETWEEN RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE THEN INV_REV.GL_POSTED_DTM 
WHEN INV_REV.GL_DT < RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE THEN RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE 
ELSE RFD.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE END
/*ADDED AS PART OF  WEEKLY BILLINGS FY20*/
 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$WORKDB.W_INV_REV_MEASURE WIRMP
    WHERE  WIRMP.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY = INV_REV.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY AND
         WIRMP.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = INV_REV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD

  WHERE (
 NOT EXISTS

SELECT 
    WDNRTINV.DRVD_NCR_REVENUE_KEY  REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY,
    WDNRTINV.SALES_ORDER_KEY  SALES_ORDER_KEY,
    WDNRTINV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
    WDNRTINV.PRODUCT_KEY   PRODUCT_KEY,
    WDNRTINV.AR_TRX_KEY   AR_TRX_KEY,
    WDNRTINV.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY   AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
    WDNRTINV.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY  BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY,
    CASE WHEN (WDNRTINV.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY>0 OR ARTIL_DV.TSV_ACCRUALS_FLG='Y' OR WDNRTINV.TSV_ACCRUALS_CD='Accrual Revenue') THEN COALESCE(END_CUST.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999)  
 
 WHEN (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('WEBEX','SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX'
    /*,'XAAS','ICMS-XAAS'*/
    ) 
    OR ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS')/*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/
	/* 'SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS' -- Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
	OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN('ORDER MANAGEMENT') AND ARTL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS%')) /*ADDED AS PART OF ICPM - TnC+ Q3FY20 */ 
	OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN('ICMS-ADJ') AND ARTL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME IN ('XAAS%')) /*ADDED AS PART OF ICPM - TnC+ Q3FY20 */ 
	OR (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN('ICMS-ADJ') AND ARTL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD IN ('BSFT')) /*Added as part of BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
	)
    THEN 
     COALESCE(SOL.ENDCST_ERP_CST_ACT_LOC_USE_KEY,-999) ELSE 
      CASE WHEN WDNRTINV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY NOT IN (-9999,-8888,-7777) THEN COALESCE(END_CUST.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999)  
           WHEN WDNRTINV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IN (-9999,-8888,-7777) THEN COALESCE(SO_END_CUST.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999) 
      ELSE -999 END  
    END  AS END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
    WDNRTINV.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY    BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
    WDNRTINV.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY    SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
    WDNRTINV.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY   SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
    WDNRTINV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY    SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
    WDNRTINV.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY   DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
    CASE  WHEN WDNRTINV.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY IS NULL 
      THEN CASE WHEN WDNRTINV.BK_SS_CD ='QTC' THEN -996 WHEN WDNRTINV.BK_SS_CD IN ('CG','CDC') THEN -995 ELSE -997 END    /* ADDED AS PART OF CDC Q4FY18*/
      ELSE WDNRTINV.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY 
    END          GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
    WDNRTINV.SALES_REP_NUM        SALES_REP_NUMBER,
    Cast(-9999 As Integer)      BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
    Cast(-999 As Integer)       BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
    Cast(-999 As Integer)       BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT,
    WDNRTINV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT      DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
    WDNRTINV.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD       DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
    WDNRTINV.GL_DTM           DD_GL_DATETIME,
    WDNRTINV.DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD       DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD,
    WDNRTINV.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME       BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
    WDNRTINV.DV_FISCAL_DT     DV_FISCAL_DT,
    WDNRTINV.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD   DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
    CASE  WHEN WDNRTINV.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='CORP_ADJ' 
      THEN 'UNKNOWN' 
      ELSE NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE 
    END         DD_BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CD,
    WDNRTINV.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD         DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD,
    WDNRTINV.SERVICE_TYPE_CD         DD_SERVICE_TYPE_CD,
    WDNRTINV.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD        BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
    CASE  WHEN WDNRTINV.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD<>'CORP_ADJ' 
      THEN NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME   
      ELSE NULL 
    END           AR_TRX_DATETIME,
    'AR'        REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
    WDNRTINV.FORWARD_REVERSE_CD         DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD,
    WDNRTINV.DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG        DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG,
    WDNRTINV.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG    DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG,
    WDNRTINV.DV_CHARGES_FLG      DV_CHARGES_FLG,
    WDNRTINV.DV_MISC_FLG     DV_MISC_FLG,
    WDNRTINV.DV_SERVICE_FLG     DV_SERVICE_FLG,
    WDNRTINV.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG   DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
    WDNRTINV.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG    DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
    WDNRTINV.DV_REVENUE_FLG     DV_REVENUE_FLG,
    WDNRTINV.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT   DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
    WDNRTINV.DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT       DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT ,
    CASE   WHEN  WDNRTINV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD = 'ERP_ADJ'  
      THEN  0.0000000
          ELSE WDNRTINV.DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT    
    END           DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM,
    WDNRTINV.DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT        DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT,
  CASE WHEN (NFDM.BK_DEAL_ID IS NOT NULL AND WDNRTINV.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY<0 AND DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD<>'STANDALONE' AND DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD='INV') THEN 0 ELSE 
    CASE  WHEN WDNRTINV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ='ERP_ADJ' 
     THEN  0.0000000 
     ELSE COALESCE ( WDNRTINV.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT, 0.000000 ) + COALESCE ( WDNRTINV.DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT, 0.000000 )  
    END
  END DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT,
    COALESCE(WDNRTINV.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT, 0.000000) + COALESCE(WDNRTINV.DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT,0.000000)    DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT,
    CASE WHEN ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG = 'Y' THEN 
     CASE WHEN WDNRTINV.LINE_TYPE_CD  ='LINE' THEN
      CAST(CAST(WDNRTINV.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT AS DECIMAL(27,8))  * 
      CAST(NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)) AS DECIMAL(27,8))
         ELSE 0.000000    
         END
    ELSE 0.000000 
    END           DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT,
    CASE  WHEN WDNRTINV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ='ERP_ADJ' 
      THEN 0.0000000
       ELSE WDNRTINV.DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT 
    END           DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT,
    WDNRTINV.DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT     DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT ,
    
    CASE  WHEN WDNRTINV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD IN ('INV' , 'ERP_ADJ')/* Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/ THEN 
     
     CASE 
     
     WHEN WDNRTINV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD='INV' AND (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE 'ICMS%' OR ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'AR-REBILLING') AND NAT.RU_SAF_TYPE_CD ='DEBIT_REBILL' THEN 0 /* Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix */ 
     WHEN WDNRTINV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD='INV'  AND NSORD.SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME  =  'Credit/Rebill' THEN 0 
     WHEN WDNRTINV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD='INV'  AND NSORD.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME  LIKE '%INV%ONLY%' AND ERP.ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER IS NOT NULL THEN 0  
     
     /*sgampa,knarlapu:to be populated as 0 for credit/rebill invoices*/
     
     ELSE  DV_EXTENDED_QTY END 
         WHEN WDNRTINV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD = 'CM' THEN 
           CASE   /* rchettri: added as a part of Lot-2A CG1 implementation  
       WHEN NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME = 'RMA with Credit' 
       */
      WHEN  (NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME = 'RMA with Credit'  
         OR
         (UPPER(NSORD.SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME) ='RMA WITH CREDIT' AND NSOL.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE ='RETURN')  )
             THEN WDNRTINV.DV_EXTENDED_QTY 
             ELSE 0.000000
           END
       ELSE 0.000000  
     END          DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY,
    /* Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/   
    CASE  WHEN WDNRTINV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ='INV' THEN 
    CASE 
    
    WHEN WDNRTINV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD='INV' AND (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE 'ICMS%'  OR ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'AR-REBILLING') AND NAT.RU_SAF_TYPE_CD ='DEBIT_REBILL' THEN 0  
    WHEN WDNRTINV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD='INV' AND NSORD.SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME  =  'Credit/Rebill' THEN 0 
    WHEN WDNRTINV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD='INV' AND NSORD.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME  LIKE '%INV%ONLY%' AND ERP.ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER IS NOT NULL THEN 0 
    
    ELSE     DV_EXTENDED_QTY END 
    
        WHEN WDNRTINV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD = 'CM' 
        THEN CASE  /* rchettri: added as a part of Lot-2A CG1 implementation  
        WHEN NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME = 'RMA with Credit' 
        */
        WHEN  (NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME = 'RMA with Credit' 
          OR
          (UPPER(NSORD.SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME) ='RMA WITH CREDIT' AND NSOL.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE ='RETURN')  )
           THEN WDNRTINV.DV_EXTENDED_QTY 
            ELSE 0.000000
          END
       ELSE 0.000000  
     END          DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY ,
    WDNRTINV.GL_DT,
    WDNRTINV.BK_SS_CD,
    /* Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/
    
    CASE 
    WHEN (ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE'ICMS%'OR ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'AR-REBILLING') AND NAT.RU_SAF_TYPE_CD ='DEBIT_REBILL' AND WDNRTINV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD = 'INV' THEN 0 
    WHEN WDNRTINV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD='INV'  AND NSORD.SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME  =  'Credit/Rebill' THEN 0 
    WHEN WDNRTINV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD='INV'  AND NSORD.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME  LIKE '%INV%ONLY%' AND ERP.ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER IS NOT NULL THEN 0
    ELSE WDNRTINV.DV_EXTENDED_QTY  END 
    
    EXTENDED_QTY, 
    
    /* Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/
    WDNRTINV.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
    WDNRTINV.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
    WDNRTINV.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD,
    WDNRTINV.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD,
    WDNRTINV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
    WDNRTINV.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY,
    CASE 
	/*Added as part of NAT_Enhacements Q4FY20-MAY Release*/
    WHEN WDNRTINV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD = 'ERP_ADJ'  AND WDNRTINV.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD IN '40153' THEN Coalesce(NAT.DV_AR_TRX_DT,DATE)
	/*Added as part of NAT_Enhacements Q4FY20-MAY Release*/
	WHEN WDNRTINV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD = 'ERP_ADJ' AND WDNRTINV.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY =-999 THEN 
     CASE WHEN COALESCE(NRA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,'NA') IN ('PA','DA') THEN NAT.DV_AR_TRX_DT ELSE NDCA.DV_TRANSACTION_DT END
    ELSE (CASE WHEN WDNRTINV.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD<>'CORP_ADJ'  THEN NAT.DV_AR_TRX_DT   ELSE NULL END ) END TRANSACTION_DT  ,

      WDNRTINV.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
     WDNRTINV.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
     WDNRTINV.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD,
     WDNRTINV.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD,
     WDNRTINV.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
     WDNRTINV.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY,
    POS_TRAN_LINE.TRANSACTION_DATE    TRANSACTION_DT  ,
     WDNRTINV.GL_POSTED_DTM ,
     WDNRTINV.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY ,
     WDNRTINV.SPLIT_PCT,
     WDNRTINV.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY,
     WDNRTINV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY       ,
     WDNRTINV.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   ,
     WDNRTINV.DV_PRODUCT_KEY                ,
     WDNRTINV.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD                ,
   'UNKNOWN' DV_ERP_DEAL_ID , 
   'UNKNOWN' BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD,
   'N'  DV_FMV_FLG ,
   'ERP_ADJ'     DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
    0.0000000 DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT,  
    CAST (
   COALESCE (
   (CASE WHEN COALESCE (ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG,'N') = 'Y' THEN 0.0000000 ELSE       
         CASE WHEN (WDNRTINV.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT <> 0) THEN 
      CAST (WDNRTINV. GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT AS DECIMAL (26, 7))
       ELSE 0.0000000
        END
   END), 0.0000000) AS DECIMAL (26, 7))  DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT,
   
    0.0000000 DV_COMP_FUNC_GROSS_REV_AMT,
      COALESCE (DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT, 0.000000) DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT, 
   0.0000000  DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT, 
      WDNRTINV.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY, 
     WDNRTINV.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY, 
     WDNRTINV.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY,
     COALESCE(WDNRTINV.DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT,0.0000000)DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT,
    WDNRTINV.POB_TYPE_CD, /* NRS MPOB Change */  
     WDNRTINV.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG, /*agannava : NRS MPOB Change*/
	WDNRTINV.TSV_ACCRUALS_CD    
    ,WDNRTINV.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY, /*ACCRUALS CHANGES JAN18*/
	WDNRTINV.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY , /*Added as part of MERAKI Q2FY19*/ 
	WDNRTINV.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME, /* Added as part of ICPM Q3FY20*/
     'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
     'I' AS DML_TYPE,
	 WDNRTINV.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_LIST_PRICE AS DD_COMP_US_ORIG_LIST_PRICE,
	WDNRTINV.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE AS DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE,
	CASE WHEN RFDM.DV_FISCAL_YR_MNTH_WEEK_NUM_INT/10 <WDNRTINV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT THEN WDNRTINV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT*10+1 ELSE
RFDM.DV_FISCAL_YR_MNTH_WEEK_NUM_INT END AS DV_TRX_FSC_YR_MTH_WK_NUM_INT    /*ADDED AS PART OF JUNE WEEKLY_BILLINGS FY20*/
,WDNRTINV.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
     FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_INV_P WDNRTINV
     INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
     ON ( WDNRTINV.BK_SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
         LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDW_GL_ACCOUNTS  ECGA
     ON ( ECGA.GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER = WDNRTINV.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD)
	/*ADDED AS PART OF  WEEKLY BILLINGS FY20*/
	INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFD
	ON RFD.CALENDAR_DATE=Cast(WDNRTINV.GL_DTM AS DATE)
	INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFM ON
	RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=WDNRTINV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT
	INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFDM
	ON RFDM.CALENDAR_DATE=CASE WHEN Cast(WDNRTINV.GL_POSTED_DTM AS DATE)<= RFD.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE AND WDNRTINV.GL_DTM BETWEEN RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE THEN WDNRTINV.GL_POSTED_DTM 
	WHEN WDNRTINV.GL_DTM < RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE THEN RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE 
	ELSE RFD.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE END
	/*ADDED AS PART OF  WEEKLY BILLINGS FY20*/	
	LEFT OUTER JOIN 
   $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE POS_TRAN_LINE
   ON (WDNRTINV.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = POS_TRAN_LINE.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT)
     WHERE  WDNRTINV.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT > 0

RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=RETRO.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFDM
ON RFDM.CALENDAR_DATE=CASE WHEN Cast(RETRO.GL_POSTED_DTM AS DATE)<= RFD.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE AND RETRO.GL_DT BETWEEN 
RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE THEN RETRO.GL_POSTED_DTM 
WHEN RETRO.GL_DT < RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE THEN RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE 
ELSE RFD.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE END
/*ADDED AS PART OF  WEEKLY BILLINGS FY20*/
 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$WORKDB.W_INV_REV_MEASURE WIRMP
      WHERE  WIRMP.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY = RETRO.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY AND
           WIRMP.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = RETRO.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD
   AND WIRMP.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = RETRO.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT)
